faqs.question: What is FadeJunkie?
faqs.answer: A free study tool built by barbers for Texas barber students preparing for the TDLR state board exam — flashcards, a timed practice quiz, and a practical exam guide, sourced from the Milady curriculum.

faqs.question: Is FadeJunkie free?
faqs.answer: Creating an account is free and gets you into flashcards, the practice quiz, and the practical exam guide. A one-time $15 lifetime pass unlocks full multi-topic study and the complete 300-question bank.

faqs.question: What topics are covered?
faqs.answer: All 13 areas tested on the Texas barber state board exam: Life Skills, History, Sanitation, Tools & Equipment, Anatomy, Haircutting, Business, Science & Chemistry, Chemical Services, Hair Science, Skin Science, Disorders, and Shaving.

faqs.question: How many hours do I need before I can take the Texas barber written exam?
faqs.answer: 900 of the required 1,000 hours of a Class A Barber course at a TDLR-licensed school.

faqs.question: Who administers the Texas barber licensing exams?
faqs.answer: PSI, TDLR's third-party testing vendor, administers both the written and practical Class A Barber exams.

faqs.question: Does FadeJunkie cover states other than Texas?
faqs.answer: Not yet — Texas Class A Barber curriculum only, for now.
